# Function Map

Discovered mappings from question types → functions → skills.
Auto-updated by `scripts/decompose-question.py` as questions are logged.
This file is the routing intelligence of the library — it gets smarter every session.

## Format

```
[function-label]: [count] uses → [SK/RL ID] ([product name])
  Common forms:
    - "[concise form 1]"
    - "[concise form 2]"
```
